name: tomorrow-then
prompt: Medium shot. Young man with tan skin and messy black hair pushing off doorframe with one hand, turning to leave. Academy shirt open at collar, silver chain necklace, rolled sleeves showing geometric wrist tattoo. Expression of someone who has decided not to say something. Warm dormitory hallway light from behind. Door on left wall of room. | anime style, modern anime aesthetic, clean linework, bold expressions, mature shading, dramatic lighting, high contrast, cel shading
bubble: Speech from Dante on LEFT at doorway, place bubble TOP-LEFT with tail pointing to him

sfx.description: quiet door latch clicking closed, metallic and final

name: wrong-heat
prompt: Medium shot. Young woman with deep red wavy disheveled hair standing alone in dormitory room. White shirt rebuttoned with one button missed. Expression hollow, vacant. Heat shimmer still filling the room. Vanity with fogged mirror behind her to the right. Door on left wall now closed. Warm amber lighting. Alone. Isolated. | anime style, modern anime aesthetic, clean linework, bold expressions, mature shading, dramatic lighting, high contrast, cel shading

dialogue.speaker: Senna
dialogue.text: Not cold enough. Not Rei enough. Not anything.

bubble: Internal thought from Senna, figure CENTER, place thought bubble TOP as internal monologue

name: drawer-again
prompt: Close-up of a feminine hand reaching for a wooden vanity drawer handle, pulling it open. Compulsive gesture, unable to resist. Warm amber light spilling from inside drawer. Dark wood surface. Fogged mirror above. | anime style, modern anime aesthetic, clean linework, bold expressions, mature shading, dramatic lighting, high contrast, cel shading
